summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mohamed Baldé's professional portfolio. Backend APIs working 100%, frontend public and admin features fully functional. Fixed critical ObjectId serialization bug in project creation endpoint.

design_issues.issue: Project images not loading properly on public page
20 project cards displayed on public page (seems excessive, might be test data duplication)

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (login, logout, JWT cookies)
Backend projects CRUD (create, read, update, delete)
Backend messages management (create, read, delete)
Backend CV management (upload, download, status)
Frontend public homepage (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Contact, Footer)
Frontend contact form submission with success message
Frontend admin login with correct credentials
Frontend admin dashboard with stats display
Frontend admin projects management (create, edit, delete)
Frontend admin messages management
Frontend admin CV management
Frontend admin logout functionality
Frontend project category filtering on public page
Frontend WhatsApp button with correct phone number
Frontend scroll-to-top functionality
Frontend smooth scrolling navigation
Frontend dark theme consistency
Frontend French language implementation
Integration between frontend and backend APIs
Object storage integration for images and CV files
